productDisplayName: Puma Men Training Tee Black Tshirt
description: Composition Black and blue round neck T-shirt made of 100% polyester, has short sleeves, mesh panels on the front, sides, sleeves and back and rubber applique of branding on the left chest Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in cold water Do not bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Cool iron; Do not iron on decorations Add oodles of style to your training sessions in this black and blue T-shirt from puma. The appliqued brand logo on the upper left chest adds an interesting detail, while the polyester fabric with moisture management keeps you feeling comfortable on extended training sessions.
